# Source globs are relative to this manifest directory (workflow-RUN_*).

column6: Tier 2 (gene_vs_protein) workflow purpose, input format (9-col gene-coordinates TSV), output structure, and how to run.
User-editable workflow configuration. Off by default.

Wide-format table: one row per processed species; columns are 5 stats (gene_count median mean min max) for each of 4 metrics (Gene_Size CDS_Size Protein_Size CDS_Segment_Count). The broad-coverage deliverable.
Per-species PROCESSED or SKIPPED_NO_DATA classification. Documents the 64-species Tier 2 set and the 6 permanently dropped species.
